task_completion.description: Agent opened and read the audit directive file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of ~/Documents/audit_directive.txt.

task_completion.description: Agent logged into ArkCase and navigated to the complaint cases.
task_completion.visual_evidence: ArkCase web interface showing the list of complaint cases or individual case details.

task_completion.description: Agent updated case priorities according to the directive and exception rules.
task_completion.visual_evidence: ArkCase interface showing Priority being changed. Specifically, Case 2 and 6 should be set to High (exception rule), Case 4 to High, and Case 1 to Medium. Case 5 Priority should remain Medium (trap avoided).

task_completion.description: Agent updated case assignees according to the directive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: ArkCase interface showing Assignee being changed to 'sally-acm' for Cases 4, 5, and 6.

task_completion.description: Agent added required case notes for the corrections and escalations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: ArkCase notes section showing new entries starting with 'QA-Q1-2026:' explaining the field corrections or priority escalations.

task_completion.description: Agent created the reconciliation report JSON file with the required structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the contents of ~/Documents/reconciliation_report.json as a JSON array with objects containing case_number, title, priority_correct, assignee_correct, sensitive_flag, and actions_taken.

integrity.description: Agent used the ArkCase web UI to make changes and add notes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the ArkCase web interface, rather than using curl/API commands in the terminal to update cases.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely created the JSON report based on findings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen typing or generating the JSON file in a text editor or via a script, rather than pasting a pre-computed hardcoded string without inspecting the cases.

integrity.description: Agent did not use database commands to modify the cases.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing psql or direct SQL UPDATE commands to the acm_complaint table.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Case 1: Priority Low -> Medium. Case 2: Priority Low -> High (genuine exception rule trigger). Case 3: No changes. Case 4: Priority Low -> High, Assignee arkcase-admin -> sally-acm. Case 5: Assignee arkcase-admin -> sally-acm (Priority stays Medium; trap exception rule avoided). Case 6: Priority Medium -> High (genuine exception rule trigger), Assignee arkcase-admin -> sally-acm. Case notes must start with 'QA-Q1-2026:'. The final JSON report must contain 6 objects with fields: case_number, title, priority_correct, assignee_correct, sensitive_flag, actions_taken.
